name: Variations for Italian Dressing
recipeIngredient: Bacon (allow to mellow for several hours)
Parmesan cheese (1 tbsp, allow to mellow for several hours)
Dry white or red wine (1 tbsp)
recipeInstructions:
1. Choose your preferred variation of Italian dressing by adding one of the following ingredients to your base recipe:
- Anchovy fillets
- Bacon (allow it to mellow for several hours before using)
- Parmesan cheese (allow it to mellow for several hours before using)
- Tomato puree
- Dry white or red wine
2. Combine your chosen variation with the remaining ingredients in a bowl.
Food exchange per serving:
- Anchovy Dressing: 1 MEAT EXCHANGE
- Bacon Dressing: 1/2 FAT EXCHANGE
- Parmesan Dressing: 1/8 MEAT EXCHANGE
- Tomato Dressing: None
- Wine Dressing: None
CAL: 1/2 C 24
